result: The R script has been successfully executed. The cleaned parental education data has been consolidated and saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The final dataset contains 16,111 unique cases (NSIDs) with exactly 5 variables: NSID, educma, educpa, educdtlma, and educdtlpa. Maternal and paternal education variables have been properly consolidated across all three waves (wave1, wave2, wave4), harmonized to standard missing codes, and converted to labelled factors with human-readable labels. The collapsed variables (educma/educpa) map 20 detailed qualification categories to a 5-level NVQ-equivalent scheme with 11 factor levels total (including missing codes).
